name: Pork Chop Casserole II
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Condensed cream of celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush pork chops with Worcestershire sauce and brown in the 2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet on a conventional surface unit.
2. In a small bowl combine celery soup, onion, salt, pepper, and parsley flakes.
3. Pour half the celery soup mixture into a 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish. Place pork chops on top and pour remaining sauce over pork chops.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 20 minutes. Pork should always be cooked to well-done.
5. Serve with noodles or mashed potatoes.
